auth.enterCredentials: Enter your credentials to access your tools

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Manage and access your development utilities.

donate.pageDescription: If you find this tool useful, consider supporting us to help maintain the server and cover AI API token costs. Every contribution is appreciated! 💖
donate.supportViaBuyMeACoffee: Support via Buy Me a Coffee – quick and convenient
donate.supportOnBuyMeACoffee: Support on Buy Me a Coffee
donate.scanQrCode: Scan the QR code to transfer directly
donate.supportHelps: Your support helps VibeTools continue to grow and provide free, useful tools for the developer community. Every contribution, big or small, means a lot to us! ❤️
donate.freeProject: VibeTools is a free project for the community

json-formatter.name: JSON Formatter
json-formatter.description: Parse, validate, and beautify JSON data. Includes a tree view for easy navigation.

http-client.name: HTTP Client
http-client.description: A powerful REST API client for testing endpoints. Supports GET, POST, PUT, DELETE.

jwt-tool.name: JWT Decoder/Encoder
jwt-tool.description: Decode, verify signatures (HS256), and generate JSON Web Tokens.

base64-conv.name: Base64 Converter
base64-conv.description: Encode/Decode Base64 strings. Supports file upload for encoding and file download for decoding.

password-gen.name: Password Generator
password-gen.description: Create strong, secure passwords with customizable character sets and length.

uuid-gen.name: UUID Generator
uuid-gen.description: Generate UUID v4/v7 and extract hidden timestamps from v7 IDs.

timestamp-conv.name: Timestamp Converter
timestamp-conv.description: Convert between Unix timestamps (s/ms/ns) and RFC3339Nano date strings.

string-hash.name: String Hash & Crypto
string-hash.description: Generate MD5, SHA-1, SHA-256, SHA-512, Hex, and Base64 hashes.

url-encoder.name: URL Encoder/Decoder
url-encoder.description: Encode text to URL-safe format or decode URLs back to plain text.

bcrypt-tool.name: Bcrypt Generator & Checker
bcrypt-tool.description: Generate secure Bcrypt password hashes and verify passwords against hashes.

string-case-converter.name: String Case Converter
string-case-converter.description: Convert text string to Uppercase, Lowercase, Title Case, CamelCase, Slug, and more.

markdown-viewer.name: Markdown Viewer & Editor
markdown-viewer.description: View, edit, and AI-format Markdown files. Supports file I/O and live preview.

html-viewer.name: HTML Viewer & Editor
html-viewer.description: Edit HTML with Live Preview, Tree View, Beautify, and Minify tools.

html-encoder.name: HTML Encode / Decode
html-encoder.description: Escape special characters to HTML entities or decode entities back to text.

string-escaper.name: String Escaper
string-escaper.description: Escape/Unescape strings for HTML, XML, JavaScript, JSON, SQL, and CSV.

string-length.name: String Length & Tokens
string-length.description: Calculate characters, words, lines, byte size, and estimate AI tokens.

xml-formatter.name: XML Formatter
xml-formatter.description: View, edit, validate, and format XML data. Includes tree view visualization.

multiline-conv.name: Text Cleaner & Formatter
multiline-conv.description: Sanitize text, remove duplicates/accents, and format multiline content.

text-replacer.name: Text Replacer
text-replacer.description: Generate text dynamically from templates using {{variable}} syntax placeholders.

log-analyzer.name: JSON Log Analyzer
log-analyzer.description: Tabular view and detailed inspector for structured JSON logs (SQL, API types).

snowflake-gen.name: Snowflake ID
snowflake-gen.description: Generate and analyze Twitter Snowflake IDs (64-bit unique identifiers).

ocr-tool.name: AI OCR Scanner
ocr-tool.description: Extract text from images using AI. Supports file upload and clipboard paste.

ai-translator.name: AI Smart Translator
ai-translator.description: Context-aware translation with strict language enforcement using AI.

text-summarizer.name: AI Text Summarizer
text-summarizer.description: Summarize text with different modes (Key points, Shortest, Detailed) and auto-translate.

smart-chat-reply.name: Smart Chat Reply
smart-chat-reply.description: Upload chat screenshots or paste logs to get AI-suggested replies in various styles.

email-generator.name: AI Email Generator
email-generator.description: Generate professional business emails in seconds. Customize tone, language, and context.

chat-to-article.name: Chat to Article
chat-to-article.description: Convert messy AI chat logs into structured, clean technical articles using AI.

ai-transcriber.name: AI Transcriber
ai-transcriber.description: Transcribe audio/video to Text, JSON, or SRT with auto-translation using AI.

markdown-parser.name: Markdown Parser
markdown-parser.description: Convert HTML, plain text, website URLs, and files (DOC, XLSX, PDF) to clean Markdown format.

jsonFormatter.pageDescription: Validate, beautify, and explore JSON data

httpClient.queryParameters: Query Parameters (Updates URL automatically with encoding)
httpClient.noQueryParameters: No query parameters. Add one or type in the URL.
httpClient.failedToParseCurl: Failed to parse cURL. Please check format.
httpClient.bodyNotAllowed: Body not allowed for GET requests
httpClient.noParams: No query parameters. Add one or type in the URL.

httpClient.waitingForInput: Send a request to see the response here.

jwtTool.pageDescription: Decode, verify, and generate JSON Web Tokens using HS256 algorithm.
jwtTool.fixInvalidJson: Fix invalid JSON to generate token
jwtTool.fixJson: Fix invalid JSON to generate token

base64Converter.pageDescription: Encode text/files to Base64 or Decode Base64 strings.
base64Converter.encodingFailed: Encoding failed. Ensure input is valid text.
base64Converter.invalidBase64: Invalid Base64 string or broken UTF-8 sequence.
base64Converter.binaryDataDetected: [Binary data detected or invalid UTF-8. Use 'Download as File' to retrieve content.]

passwordGenerator.pageDescription: Generate secure, random passwords with custom requirements.
passwordGenerator.avoidsChars: Avoids characters like I, l, 1, O, 0

uuidGenerator.pageDescription: Generate UUIDs (v4/v7) or analyze them to extract hidden timestamps.

timestampConverter.pageDescription: Convert between Unix timestamps (s, ms, ns) and RFC3339Nano dates.

stringHash.pageDescription: Generate cryptographic hashes (MD5, SHA, Keccak) and encodings from string input.

urlConverter.pageDescription: Encode text for URL query parameters or decode URL-encoded strings.
urlConverter.encodePlaceholder: Type text to encode (e.g. Hello World)...

bcryptTool.pageDescription: Securely hash passwords or verify if a plain text password matches a Bcrypt hash.
bcryptTool.saltRoundsNote: Higher rounds = slower generation & better security. Rounds ≥ 12 may freeze browser temporarily.
bcryptTool.passwordCorrect: The password is correct for this hash.
bcryptTool.passwordNoMatch: The password does not match the provided hash.
bcryptTool.matchDescription: The password is correct for this hash.
bcryptTool.noMatchDescription: The password does not match the provided hash.

textCaseConverter.pageDescription: Convert text between different formats (upper, lower, camel, slug, etc).
textCaseConverter.placeholder: Type or paste text here to convert...

markdownViewer.pageDescription: View, edit, and AI-format Markdown files.

htmlViewer.pageDescription: Edit HTML with live preview, DOM tree visualization, and code formatting.

htmlEncoder.pageDescription: Convert text to HTML entities (escape) or decode entities back to text.
htmlEncoder.rawTextPlaceholder: Type text with special chars like <div id='1'>...
htmlEncoder.unexpectedError: An unexpected error occurred during processing.

stringEscaper.pageDescription: Escape and unescape strings for various languages and formats (JSON, HTML, SQL, etc.).
stringEscaper.invalidFormat: Invalid escaped string format. Make sure your backslashes and quotes are correctly escaped for JSON.

stringLengthCalculator.pageDescription: Real-time analysis: characters, words, sentences, and word frequency density.
stringLengthCalculator.placeholder: Type content here or upload a file to analyze...
stringLengthCalculator.enterTextToAnalyze: Enter text to analyze word frequency

xmlFormatter.pageDescription: View, edit, validate, and format XML data with tree visualization.
xmlFormatter.fixErrorsToViewTree: Fix XML errors to view tree

multilineConverter.pageDescription: Sanitize text, remove duplicates, strip accents, and format multiline content.

textReplacer.pageDescription: Create dynamic templates using {{variable}} syntax or helpers like {{Base64Encode|value}}.
textReplacer.nestVariables: You can nest variables inside helpers!

logAnalyzer.pageDescription: Analyze structured JSON logs with SQL and API tracing support.
logAnalyzer.placeholder: Paste JSON logs here (one per line)

snowflakeGenerator.pageDescription: Generate and analyze Twitter-compatible Snowflake IDs (64-bit).

ocrTool.pageDescription: Extract text from images using AI
ocrTool.dragDrop: Drag & drop here, or browse files
ocrTool.uploadAndExtract: Upload an image and click Extract
ocrTool.waitingForInput: Upload an image and click Extract

aiTranslator.pageDescription: Context-aware translation with strict language enforcement using AI.
aiTranslator.contextPlaceholder: e.g. Formal business email, Coding documentation, Slang...
aiTranslator.cannotSwap: Cannot swap when source is Auto Detect

textSummarizer.pageDescription: Condense long texts using AI with different levels of detail and auto-translation.
textSummarizer.placeholder: Paste the text you want to summarize here...
textSummarizer.shortestDesc: Extreme compression while retaining core meaning.
textSummarizer.keyPointsDesc: Bullet points of the main ideas.
textSummarizer.conciseDesc: Balanced summary, no missing points, efficient wording.
textSummarizer.professionalDesc: Title, clear layout, logical flow, easy to understand.

emailGenerator.pageDescription: Create professional emails instantly with custom tone and language options.
emailGenerator.aboutPlaceholder: e.g. Ask David to reschedule our meeting to next Monday at 10 AM...
emailGenerator.anyLanguageHint: You can describe this in any language.
emailGenerator.subject: Subject

chatToArticle.pageDescription: Transform messy AI chat logs into clean, structured technical documentation or blog posts.

aiTranscriber.pageDescription: Transcribe and translate audio/video files to Text, JSON, or SRT using AI Multimodal.
aiTranscriber.supportsFormats: Supports MP3, WAV, MP4, MPEG, etc.
